title: AUTOCMD
description: A plugin which automatically runs command ingame
body:
# рЯІ© AutoCommandPlugin

AutoCommandPlugin is a simple and powerful Minecraft plugin that lets you automatically run multiple server commands after specific delays. You can also manually run them using `/autocmd`, or add new ones using `/autocmd add`.

---

## вЬЕ Plugin Features

- вП±пЄП Run multiple commands after server starts with custom delays
- рЯФБ Commands auto-execute at specific times
- вЮХ Add new commands with `/autocmd add <command>`
- рЯОЃ Optional in-game usage (enabled/disabled via config)
- рЯО® Supports Minecraft color codes (like `&a`, `&c`)
- рЯЫ°пЄП Blocks abuse by restricting in-game access with a toggle
- рЯІЊ Simple config file with easy setup

---

## рЯУ• How to Install

1. Download the `.jar` file
2. Place it in your `plugins/` folder
3. Start or restart your Minecraft server
4. The plugin creates a `config.yml` and auto-runs your first command in 30 seconds!

---

## вЪЩпЄП Config File: `config.yml`

```yaml
allow_in_game_command: false

# You can add more below or use /autocmd add <command>
commands:
  setup:
    delay: 30
    command: "&a[AutoCommandPlugin] &fThis plugin is now set up and running every 30 seconds!"
```

### Explanation:

| Setting | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `allow_in_game_command` | `true` or `false` вАФ if `false`, players can't run `/autocmd` or add new commands |
| `commands` | A list of commands to run automatically |
| `delay` | Delay in **seconds** after server starts |
| `command` | The actual command to run (use `&` for colors) |

---

## рЯІµ Commands

### рЯФє `/autocmd`
Runs all the commands listed in `config.yml` immediately.

- вЬЕ Works in-game **only if** `allow_in_game_command: true`
- вЭМ Otherwise shows this message:  
  `In-game command usage is disabled. Enable it from config.yml.`

---

### рЯФє `/autocmd add <command>`
Adds a new command to `config.yml` and runs it after **30 seconds**.

**Example:**
```
/autocmd add broadcast &eCheck out our Discord at discord.gg/server
```

This will save:
```yaml
commands:
  cmd_1:
    delay: 30
    command: "broadcast &eCheck out our Discord at discord.gg/server"
```

---

## рЯУЭ Example Config

```yaml
allow_in_game_command: false

commands:
  welcome:
    delay: 5
    command: "say &6Welcome to the server!"
  auto_chunky:
    delay: 20
    command: "chunky start"
  tip:
    delay: 60
    command: "broadcast &bTIP: &fDon't forget to claim your daily reward!"
```

---

## рЯІ™ Compatible Servers

| Server Type | Version     |
|-------------|-------------|
| вЬЕ Paper     | 1.13 вАУ 1.21.5+ |
| вЬЕ Spigot    | 1.13 вАУ 1.21.5+ |
| вЬЕ Bukkit    | 1.13 вАУ 1.21.5+ |

Works on all latest Minecraft versions. No outdated code or version locks.

---

## рЯФР Security Option

To prevent OP abuse or unwanted use, the plugin lets you block in-game command usage.

If a player tries to use `/autocmd` or `/autocmd add` in-game and itвАЩs disabled in config, they will see:

```
In-game command usage is disabled. Enable it from config.yml.
```

Commands can **always be used from console**.

---

## рЯС§ Plugin Info

- Made by: **JODVISHAL**
- Discord: `isthisvishal`

---

Enjoy using AutoCommandPlugin and automate your Minecraft tasks easily! рЯОЙ
